docket_entries.description: ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORPORATION

PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORPORATION SERVED JUL-28-2003, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERTS, JOHN DBA VALERIE'S PSYCHIC READINGS

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERTS, JOHN DBA VALERIE'S PSYCHIC READINGS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORPORATION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBERTS, JOHN DBA VALERIE'S PSYCHIC READINGS $2,912.36 PRINCIPAL, $883.20 INTEREST, $120.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,915.86, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
ORDER FOR EXAMINATION AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN ROBERTS ON DEC-08-2003 OFF CALENDAR. NO APPEARANCES, NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE.
PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION, WRIT MAY ISSUE ON 9/3/03 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERTS, JOHN DBA VALERIE'S PSYCHIC READINGS OEX HEARING SET FOR DEC-08-2003 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 612
